description: Connects the gauge unification domain (beta coefficients, CD representation) to the hadron physics domain (proton mass, pion mass, nuclear force) through the confinement boundary. The CD shifts b3 by 1/3, repositioning the confinement scale Lambda_QCD, which propagates to all hadron properties.
thesis: The confinement boundary is a soliton boundary positioned by the exact fractional beta coefficient b3. The CD modifies b3 from -7 to -20/3, shifting the boundary and all readings at it. The proton mass is 99% confinement energy, making it a derived quantity up to the lattice factor C = m_p / Lambda_QCD.
formula: Lambda_QCD = M_Z * exp(2*pi / (b3 * alpha_s(M_Z))), with threshold matching at m_t, m_b, m_c
